items.title: 40+ Java Multithreading & Concurrency Interview Questions
items.description: A comprehensive, detailed list of tricky and real-world Java Multithreading interview questions for experienced developers (2–7 years).

items.title: Accenture Java Interview Questions
items.description: Real interview questions and practical Java answers from an Accenture first-round discussion.

items.title: AWS Lambda
items.description: Comprehensive Lambda study guide for DVA-C02. Covers invocation types, concurrency, cold starts, event source mappings, layers, container images, environment variables, VPC integration, destinations, and Java handler patterns.

items.title: Concurrent Collections (Part 1)
items.description: Concurrent collection fundamentals and ConcurrentHashMap internals for interview preparation.

items.title: Concurrent Collections (Part 2)
items.description: Advanced concurrent collection interview topics including modCount behavior and CopyOnWriteArrayList usage.

items.title: Deloitte Java Developer Interview Experience & Questions [3 Technical Rounds]
items.description: A comprehensive guide covering real technical interview questions and answers from a Deloitte Java Developer interview (4 years experience). Covers Core Java, Concurrency, Spring Boot, Microservices, and System Design.

items.title: Handling Contention
items.description: Strategies for dealing with race conditions, concurrent writes, hot spots, and lock contention in distributed systems including optimistic locking, MVCC, distributed locks, and queue-based serialization.

items.title: Java Concurrency: Threads, Locks & Concurrent Utilities
items.description: Comprehensive guide to Java concurrency, covering threads, synchronization, locks, concurrent utilities, and async programming.

items.title: Java Multithreading Interview Questions
items.description: Java multithreading interview questions covering threading models, lifecycle, and synchronization basics.

items.title: Processes & Threads
items.description: Deep dive into processes, threads, their lifecycle, memory layout, context switching, and Java/JVM perspective on concurrency primitives.

items.title: PwC Java Developer Interview Experience & Questions [15 LPA+]
items.description: A comprehensive list of technical interview questions and answers from a real PwC Java Developer interview for a candidate with 3 years of experience. Covers Concurrency, Spring Boot, Microservices, and Database Locking.

items.title: Synchronization & Deadlocks
items.description: Race conditions, critical sections, mutexes, semaphores, monitors, classic synchronization problems, deadlock detection/prevention, and Java concurrency utilities.

items.title: Transactions & Concurrency Control
items.description: ACID properties, isolation levels, locking mechanisms, MVCC, deadlocks, and optimistic vs pessimistic concurrency.
